channel.title: NPR Topics: World
channel.description: NPR world news, international art and culture, world business and financial markets, world economy, and global trends in health, science and technology. Subscribe to the World Story of the Day podcast and RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: G7 leaders open summit talks in France on Ukraine and the Middle East
item.description: The talks come on the heels of President Trump's announcement of an agreement to end the U.S. war against Iran. In recent weeks, the Iranian conflict has overshadowed the war in Ukraine.
item.content:encoded:
The talks come on the heels of President Trump's announcement of an agreement to end the U.S. war against Iran. In recent weeks, the Iranian conflict has overshadowed the war in Ukraine.

(Image credit: Christopher Katsarov)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Trump arrives in France for G7 leaders summit, touting peace deal with Iran
item.description: French president Emmanuel Macron met with Trump and congratulated him for signing the new Iran agreement.
item.content:encoded: French president Emmanuel Macron met with Trump and congratulated him for signing the new Iran agreement.
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez

item.title: U.S. and Iran reach an agreement, but details remain scant
item.description: President Trump says a deal had been reached to prolong a ceasefire with Iran and open the Strait of Hormuz, but many challenges remain.
item.content:encoded: President Trump says a deal had been reached to prolong a ceasefire with Iran and open the Strait of Hormuz, but many challenges remain.
item.dc:creator: Greg Myre

item.title: Drone strikes one of Ukraine's key Christian and cultural sites
item.description: Russian strikes have left cultural scars across Ukraine, damaging Kharkiv's Art Museum and striking Kyiv's historic Pechersk Lavra monastery, reminding how war reaches even sacred and storied places.
item.content:encoded: Russian strikes have left cultural scars across Ukraine, damaging Kharkiv's Art Museum and striking Kyiv's historic Pechersk Lavra monastery, reminding how war reaches even sacred and storied places.
item.dc:creator: Hanna Palamarenko

item.title: Crude oil is cheaper as markets embrace news of a U.S.-Iran deal
item.description: Crude oil prices are falling as oil markets react to President Trump saying the U.S. and Iran have agreed on a framework for reopening the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: Crude oil prices are falling as oil markets react to President Trump saying the U.S. and Iran have agreed on a framework for reopening the Strait of Hormuz.
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske

item.title: Lead negotiator on 2015 Iran nuclear deal weighs in on what's next for Trump's deal
item.description: NPR's Ailsa Chang talks with Wendy Sherman, the lead U.S. negotiator on the 2015 Iran nuclear agreement, about the road ahead for U.S. negotiators aiming to strike a new deal to end the Iran war.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Ailsa Chang talks with Wendy Sherman, the lead U.S. negotiator on the 2015 Iran nuclear agreement, about the road ahead for U.S. negotiators aiming to strike a new deal to end the Iran war.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Hodges

item.title: Former American businessman detained in Myanmar after alleged financial misconduct
item.description: Adam Castillo, founder of AGS Myanmar, was detained Thursday at Yangon International Airport. The U.S. State Department is aware of a reported detention but hasn't commented further.
item.content:encoded:
Adam Castillo, founder of AGS Myanmar, was detained Thursday at Yangon International Airport. The U.S. State Department is aware of a reported detention but hasn't commented further.

(Image credit: Gemunu Amarasinghe)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Trump announces deal to end war in Iran. And, how to stay safe in deadly heat
item.description: Trump says a deal has been reached to end the war between the U.S. and Iran. Plus, this is what extreme temperatures do to the human body — and how you can keep yourself safe.
item.content:encoded:
Trump says a deal has been reached to end the war between the U.S. and Iran. Plus, this is what extreme temperatures do to the human body — and how you can keep yourself safe.

(Image credit: Chris Graythen)
item.dc:creator: Suzanne Nuyen

item.title: Britain will ban under-16s from social media apps, including TikTok and YouTube
item.description: The ban will apply to platforms including Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook and X. The move makes the U.K. part of a growing global movement to tighten online safety for children.
item.content:encoded:
The ban will apply to platforms including Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook and X. The move makes the U.K. part of a growing global movement to tighten online safety for children.

(Image credit: Carlos Jasso)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: U.S. and Iran announce an initial deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The deal is a major breakthrough in the conflict that set the Middle East aflame and shook the global economy. However, it did not resolve critical issues set aside for further negotiations.
item.content:encoded:
The deal is a major breakthrough in the conflict that set the Middle East aflame and shook the global economy. However, it did not resolve critical issues set aside for further negotiations.

(Image credit: Mandel Ngan)
item.dc:creator: Greg Myre
